item.title: GPU / 裸金属算力租赁
item.summary: 以 GPU、服务器或裸金属资源租赁为主要收入来源的范式。

updates.event: The joint AMD and Cerebras disaggregated AI inference solution was unveiled at the Advancing AI 2026 conference.
Cerebras plans to deploy AMD Helios systems in its data centers as part of the joint solution.

facts.statement: The joint AMD and Cerebras disaggregated AI inference solution was unveiled at the Advancing AI 2026 conference.
Cerebras plans to deploy AMD Helios systems in its data centers as part of the joint solution.
facts.value: plans to deploy AMD Helios in Cerebras data centers

item.html:
The joint AMD and Cerebras disaggregated AI inference solution was unveiled at the Advancing AI 2026 conference.

Cerebras plans to deploy AMD Helios systems in its data centers as part of the joint solution.
